overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player character traverses city streets, ascends a concrete stairwell, walks through a vibrant illuminated pedestrian tunnel, and emerges at an elevated overlook of the street below.

events.description: turning left to follow the curve of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk past illuminated billboards and glass skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: blue sedan driving along the street

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying 'OUT OF TIME' with a woman's face
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents
multi-level highway structure with concrete pillars
commercial buildings with bright neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city street at night, dominated by a large 'OUT OF TIME' digital billboard. The player walks along the sidewalk past glass skyscrapers with illuminated windows, while sparse pedestrians and occasional vehicles move through the scene. The camera turns left to follow the street curve, revealing more of the neon-lit urban canyon.

events.description: entering covered area beneath massive concrete overpass
approaching concrete stairway entrance on the left

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass structure toward a stairway entrance

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with thick support pillars
building facade with large orange V symbol
wide concrete stairway leading upward to pedestrian bridge

segments.scene_description: The player enters a sheltered area beneath a massive concrete highway overpass, blocking most of the sky. The environment shifts to darker mixed lighting with the highway structure now overhead. A building with a distinctive orange V logo becomes visible on the left as the player approaches a concrete stairway leading upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell leading to pedestrian bridge

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs toward the pedestrian bridge entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead up the stairs

entered.detail: enclosed concrete staircase with wall-mounted linear lights
arched pedestrian bridge with colorful glass panels and illuminated floor

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow enclosed stairwell with artificial lighting, ascending toward an upper level. At the top of the stairs, the scene transitions into a vibrant pedestrian tunnel with colorful arched glass panels and a glowing neon floor. Other pedestrians are visible walking ahead into the illuminated passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit pedestrian tunnel with dynamic floor lighting

events.description: passing pedestrians walking in opposite direction
floor lighting shifts colors from purple to orange hues

agents.ego_description: walking through the vibrant tunnel passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking toward camera
pedestrian walking away from camera deeper into tunnel

entered.detail: series of colorful arched frames with mesh walls creating a tunnel effect
illuminated floor strips cycling through pink, blue, and orange colors

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a long, enclosed pedestrian tunnel illuminated by vibrant neon lights. The floor panels cycle through colors beneath the player's feet while the arched structure surrounds the path. Moderate crowds of pedestrians walk in both directions through this sheltered, futuristic passageway.

events.description: exiting colorful tunnel into concrete building interior
reaching open overlook with view of street traffic below

agents.ego_description: walking through corridor and approaching overlook to view the street below

entered.detail: brutalist concrete hallway with overhead strip lighting
large open windows revealing street level below
digital advertisements visible on buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The player exits the colorful tunnel into a brutalist concrete corridor with artificial lighting. Walking forward, the scene opens to an elevated overlook with large windows revealing the street traffic and neon billboards below. The camera approaches the overlook, providing a view of the multi-lane road and surrounding cityscape from above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit city street, ascending through enclosed structures to reach an elevated urban overlook. It begins on a sidewalk beneath a massive OUT OF TIME digital billboard, moving past glass skyscrapers before turning to follow the curve of the urban canyon. As the camera enters the shadow of a massive concrete highway overpass, the lighting dims and the path leads toward a building with an orange V logo and a concrete stairway. The scene then shifts upward through a narrow stairwell and into a vibrant pedestrian tunnel, where the environment transforms into a kaleidoscope of colorful arched glass panels and a glowing, color-cycling floor. Finally, the camera exits the tunnel through a brutalist concrete corridor, opening onto an elevated overlook that reveals the multi-lane road and shimmering cityscape from above.
